name: Pesan Dari Hati
overview: The story of Melati, a little girl who is faced with destiny facing circumstances that shape her into a strong-willed person. When she has to separate from her family at a young age, her future is questioned. From someone who has nothing, life forges her into the best version of herself. Her tenacity and determination shape her to dare to face difficulties, turning those difficulties into opportunities to advance the people around her and others.

trailers.title: Pesan Dari Hati | Trailer | Kolaborasi Viu, Grab, dan OVO
